sweepers.name: ScheduledMessageSweeper
sweepers.tick-interval: 1000ms (1s) default; throttled to 30s per bug-93 PR #203 band-aid
sweepers.business-logic: fireAt check; evaluatePrecondition; pending → delivered transition (fire) OR pending → precondition-failed transition (cancel; with audit-entry)
sweepers.bug-93-context: PRIMARY target — O(N) listMessages scan was the CPU-pressure source; watch-driven model structurally eliminates the polling cost

sweepers.name: MessageProjectionSweeper
sweepers.filter-shape: ALL threads (client-side filter on lastMessageProjectedAt < updatedAt)
sweepers.tick-interval: 5000ms (5s) default; throttled to 30s per bug-93 PR #203 band-aid
sweepers.business-logic: Bounded-shadow polling for W1 in-process thread-message migration shim gap-closure; idempotent via migrationSourceId pattern; markLastMessageProjected CAS for forward-progress
sweepers.bug-93-context: SECONDARY target — O(N) listThreads scan compounded the bug-93 CPU pressure; watch-driven model on Thread.updatedAt + migrationSourceId idempotency cleaner
sweepers.w3-substrate-version-status: SHIPPED at W3.x.1 — full migrationSourceId find-or-create + Thread.messages[] walk + markLastMessageProjected get-then-put preserved

sweepers.name: PulseSweeper
sweepers.filter-shape: active missions; agent + task cross-references per pulse-config
sweepers.business-logic: Drives declarative per-mission pulses; consults pulse-config per mission; cross-references active agents + tasks
sweepers.bug-93-context: Not primary bug-93 target; lower-frequency tick; multi-store cross-reference logic
sweepers.w3-substrate-version-status: SHIPPED at W3.x.2 — MINIMAL substrate-API integration (substrate.list('Mission', filter active)); evaluatePulse + iterateAgentPulses BUSINESS LOGIC STUBBED per scope-note (full port deferred to W3.x.2-extended OR W4 repository-composition where MissionRepository internally composes substrate); 2 integration tests cover substrate-API integration + skip-no-pulses edge

sweepers.name: CascadeReplaySweeper
sweepers.business-logic: Re-runs cascade actions on pending-state threads; per-action idempotency catches duplicates
sweepers.bug-93-context: Not primary bug-93 target; lower-frequency tick
sweepers.w3-substrate-version-status: SHIPPED at W3.x.3 — full listCascadePending equivalent via substrate.list('Thread', filter cascadePending:true) + runCascade composition + markCascadeCompleted get-then-put preserved
